+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "netdata: Vsphere monitoring",
+    "description": "Vsphere monitoring. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current netdata setup",
+        "description": "Verify your netdata version and configuration:\n```bash\nnetdata -v\n```\nThis feature requires a working netdata installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review netdata configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant netdata configuration:\nWe are willing to support monitoring ***[Vsphere](https://www.vmware.com/products/vsphere.html)*** with netdata."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Vsphere monitoring",
+        "description": "To begin with we need to identify what should be monitored. I see telegraf has a nice vsphere plugin (it is huge and collects a lot of metrics).\n\nMetrics - https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf/blob/master/plugins/inputs/vsphere/METRICS.md\n\nAny other metrics we could be interested in?\n\n___ \nThe\n```yaml\njobs:\n  - name     : vcenter\n    url      : https://<IP>\n    username : administrator@vsphere.local\n    password : <PASSWORD>\n    tls_skip_verify: yes\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Vsphere monitoring\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "To begin with we need to identify what should be monitored. I see telegraf has a nice vsphere plugin (it is huge and collects a lot of metrics).\n\nMetrics - https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf/blob/master/plugins/inputs/vsphere/METRICS.md\n\nAny other metrics we could be interested in?\n\n___ \nThe problem is\n\nSo the set of metrics is vary a lot...",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "jobs:\n  - name     : vcenter\n    url      : https://<IP>\n    username : administrator@vsphere.local\n    password : <PASSWORD>\n    tls_skip_verify: yes"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "netdata-4888-vsphere-monitoring",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "netdata: Vsphere monitoring",
+    "description": "Vsphere monitoring. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current netdata setup",
+        "description": "Verify your netdata version and configuration:\n```bash\nnetdata version\n```\nThis feature requires a working netdata installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review netdata configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant netdata configuration:\nWe are willing to support monitoring ***[Vsphere](https://www.vmware.com/products/vsphere.html)*** with netdata."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Vsphere monitoring",
+        "description": "vCenter itself has some health metrics too\n\n```\nHEALTH:\n\tThe vCenter Server Appliance API offers health status indicators for several key components of the appliance:\n - green  The component is healthy.\n - yellow The component is healthy, but may have some problems.\n - orange The component is\n```yaml\njobs:\n  - name     : vcenter\n    url      : https://<IP>\n    username : administrator@vsphere.local\n    password : <PASSWORD>\n    tls_skip_verify: yes\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Vsphere monitoring\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "vCenter itself has some health metrics too\n\n```\nHEALTH:\n\tThe vCenter Server Appliance API offers health status indicators for several key components of the appliance:\n - green  The component is healthy.\n - yellow The component is healthy, but may have some problems.\n - orange The component is degraded, and may have serious problems.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "jobs:\n  - name     : vcenter\n    url      : https://<IP>\n    username : administrator@vsphere.local\n    password : <PASSWORD>\n    tls_skip_verify: yes"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
